Article.ArticleTitle: Associations among dynamic cerebral autoregulation, baroreflex sensitivity, and carotid distensibility in young healthy adults: insight from endurance training.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Human Informatics and Interaction Research Institute, National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology (AIST), 1-1-1 Higashi, Tsukuba, Ibaraki, 305-8566, Japan. tsubasa.toumoto@aist.go.jp.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: The author(s) declared no potential conflicts of interest with respect to the research, authorship, and/or publication of this article.
